svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux aarch64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="tQzK_UYGIPKAnOEJNh5s" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-464" dy="-202" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="LLM Fine-Tuning Pipeline" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="760" x="100" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ph1_bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;opacity=30;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="580" width="170" x="20" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ph1_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fillColor=#dae8fc;" value="PHASE 1
Data Preparation" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="170" x="20" y="88" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="Define Task & Objectives" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="35" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="Collect Domain Data" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="35" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="Clean & Filter Data" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="35" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="Format Dataset
(Instruction / Chat)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="35" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="Train / Val / Test Split" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="35" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="Tokenize & Batch" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="35" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ph2_bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;opacity=30;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="580" width="170" x="210" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ph2_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="PHASE 2
Method Selection" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="170" x="210" y="88" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;" value="Choose Base Model
(LLaMA, Mistral, etc.)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="225" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;" value="Full Fine-Tuning
(All weights updated)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="225" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;" value="LoRA
(Low-Rank Adapters)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="225" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="QLoRA
(Quantized LoRA, 4-bit)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="225" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;" value="Instruction Tuning
(SFT)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="225" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;" value="RLHF / DPO
(Alignment)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="225" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ph3_bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;opacity=30;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="580" width="170" x="400" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ph3_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="PHASE 3
Training" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="170" x="400" y="88" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Configure Hyperparameters
(lr, batch, epochs)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="415" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Initialize Optimizer
(AdamW, 8-bit Adam)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="415" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Training Loop
(Forward / Backward Pass)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="415" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Gradient Checkpointing
& Mixed Precision (bf16)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="415" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Monitor Loss & Metrics
(W&B, MLflow)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="415" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Save Checkpoints
& Adapters" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="415" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ph4_bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;opacity=30;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="580" width="170" x="590" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ph4_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="PHASE 4
Evaluation & Deployment" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="170" x="590" y="88" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ev1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Benchmark Evaluation
(MMLU, MT-Bench, etc.)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="605" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ev2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Task-Specific Metrics
(BLEU, ROUGE, F1)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="605" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ev3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Human Evaluation
& Red Teaming" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="605" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ev4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Merge LoRA Weights
(if using PEFT)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="605" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ev5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Quantize for Inference
(GGUF, AWQ, GPTQ)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="605" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ev6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Deploy & Monitor
(vLLM, Ollama, API)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="605" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="iter" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontStyle=2;fontSize=11;" value="Iterate & Improve" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="360" x="300" y="670" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="iter_arrow" edge="1" parent="1" source="ev6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;dashed=1;strokeColor=#666666;" target="d1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="675" y="660" /> <mxPoint x="105" y="660" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pa1" edge="1" parent="1" source="ph1_bg" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=3;fillColor=#6c8ebf;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" target="ph2_bg"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pa2" edge="1" parent="1" source="ph2_bg" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=3;fillColor=#9673a6;strokeColor=#9673a6;" target="ph3_bg"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pa3" edge="1" parent="1" source="ph3_bg" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=3;fillColor=#d6b656;strokeColor=#d6b656;" target="ph4_bg"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
